acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-release-management SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The release manager SIG is responsible for coordinating teams for openEuler project. The SIG has 20 core members and maintains 3 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-release-management SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-release-management SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at release@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-release-management SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-release-management SIG maintains 3 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-release-management.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-release-management SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-release-management SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: chenyaqiang, Hufeng, Huangchengpiao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
